findings.title: Insecure Direct Object Reference (IDOR) in Contacts AJAX endpoint
findings.input: The id parameter in POST request
findings.reach: An attacker can send a POST request to modules/contacts/api/inline_edit.php with an arbitrary id
findings.impact: Unauthorized update of email, phone, and other contact information for any employee in the company

findings.title: RBAC Bypass in Select Options API allows unauthorized record creation
findings.input: The table parameter in POST request
findings.reach: A user can use the Select Options API to insert records into whitelisted tables for which they lack create permissions
findings.impact: Unauthorized addition of reference data (e.g., departments, equipment types, etc.) bypassing module-level access controls

findings.title: Missing RBAC enforcement in IDFs API endpoints
findings.input: Direct AJAX requests to IDF API endpoints
findings.reach: A user can bypass the UI and interact directly with endpoints in modules/idfs/api/
findings.impact: Unauthorized modification of network topology, including IDF links and port configurations

findings.title: Unauthorized hierarchy updates in Org Chart module
findings.input: The action=update_hierarchy parameter in POST request
findings.reach: A user can drag and drop nodes in the Org Chart to trigger a hierarchy update
findings.impact: Unauthorized changes to the company reporting structure
